title: Fix rand_mode()/constraint_mode() crash when used as function arguments (#7051)
body:
## Summary

Fix internal error (`unlinked`) when `rand_mode()` or `constraint_mode()` is passed as a function argument. Per IEEE 1800-2017 §18.8/§18.9, these methods return int values and should be usable in any expression context.

## Issue

Fix #7051 

## Changes

- Added `iterateChildren(nodep)` before the early return in `RandomizeVisitor::visit(AstNodeFTaskRef*)` for non-randomize function calls, so nested `rand_mode`/`constraint_mode`/`randomize` method calls in function arguments are visited and transformed

## Test

- Added `test_regress/t/t_randomize_rand_mode_funcarg.{v,py}` — passes `rand_mode()` return value as function argument, verifies query and set operations

---

Written by Claude Code and PlanV GmbH.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
